params.prompt: Use the attached screenshot and tell me the page title in one short sentence.
Search the web for the official Python documentation page on list comprehensions and answer in one sentence with a citation.
Open python.org, browse to the docs, compare list comprehensions vs generator expressions in detail, and produce a 10 bullet guide with citations.
What page is shown in the screenshot? Answer in one sentence.
Search the web for official Python documentation about list comprehensions and answer in one sentence with sources.
